description_long: This lamp features an industrial, steampunk-inspired design constructed primarily from dark metal pipes and fittings. The base consists of four sturdy pipe legs that provide stability, converging at a central vertical pipe that supports the lamp's body. The lamp head is a wide, dome-shaped metal shade, attached to a curved pipe arm that gives the fixture a distinctive, utilitarian appearance. The exposed pipework and fittings are visually prominent, emphasizing a rugged, mechanical aesthetic. The finish is matte to semi-glossy black, with subtle highlights on the metal surfaces. This lamp would be well-suited for urban lofts, garages, or industrial-themed public spaces.
description: A black, industrial-style lamp made from metal pipes and fittings with a dome-shaped shade and a sturdy four-legged base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dome-shaped shade, central vertical pipe, and symmetrical four-legged pipe base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved pipe arm and the depth of the dome shade, with the base's cross structure visible.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the lamp's profile, the curvature of the pipe arm, and the shade's overhang.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the dome shade and the pipework structure supporting the lamp.
